pi_items.source: Code analysis: task.json description, setup_task.sh (lines 24, 37), export_result.sh (line 22)
Code analysis: task.json description (line 6), setup_task.sh (lines 20, 108) creates file at this exact path
Code analysis: setup_task.sh embeds this string as HTML comment (line 90), export_result.sh checks for it (line 40)
Code analysis: task.json description (line 5), setup_oscar.sh (lines 217, 373) configure this account
Code analysis: task.json description (line 5), setup_oscar.sh (lines 217, 374), contains SHA-1 hash configuration

privileged_info_summary: The task installs a synthetic eForm template named 'Rapid Pain Assessment' into an Oscar EMR system. The HTML file is generated at /home/ga/Documents/pain_assessment.html containing the verification string 'RPA_2024_SECURE_CHECK' embedded as an HTML comment. The default login credentials are username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', and PIN '1117'. All metadata values are correctly documented and consistent across task scripts. The form is created entirely synthetically by setup scripts with no external data sources.
